title: StaffHelp
description: A reporting plugin for players to insta report to staff
body:
StaffHelp: Advanced Player Reporting System
Overview

StaffHelp is a comprehensive solution for Minecraft servers that need an efficient, modern way to handle player reports and suggestions. This lightweight yet powerful plugin gives players an easy way to report rule-breakers and submit suggestions, while providing staff with a robust in-game and web-based dashboard for managing reports, moderation actions, and community feedback.
Key Features
For Players

    Simple Reporting: Report rule violations with /report <player> <reason>.

    Suggestion System: Submit ideas via /suggest <suggestion>.

    Cooldown System: Configurable delay to prevent spam.

    Confirmation & Notification: Receive feedback when reports are filed and get notified when your suggestions are accepted, declined, or completed — even if you were offline when the decision was made.

For Staff

    Centralized Management: View and manage all reports with /readreports or through the web dashboard.

    Suggestion Review: Browse suggestions via /readsuggestions and approve, decline, or mark them as complete.

    Real-time Alerts: Instant notifications when new reports are filed.

    Advanced Moderation Tools:

        Customizable punishment commands (ban, kick, mute, tempban, IP ban).

        Target both reporter and reported for false reports.

        Time-based punishments with configurable durations.

        Full action logging for accountability.

Web Interface (localhost:9090)

A beautiful, responsive dashboard accessible from any browser:

    Reports Tab: View, filter, and act on reports with dropdown menus.

    Suggestions Tab: Manage suggestions with a clear accept/decline/complete workflow.

    Action Logs: Track all moderation actions taken.

    Theme Toggle: Switch between dark and light modes.

    Real-Time Stats: See total and unresolved reports, pending suggestions, and more.

    Secure Login: Customizable username and password.

    Auto-Refresh: Keep data up to date (default 30s, configurable).

Technical Features

    Highly Configurable: Fully editable messages, cooldowns, and command behavior.

    Permission-Based Access: Control who can report, view, or manage reports.

    Persistent Storage: Data saved between restarts.

    Optional Auto-Purge: Automatically clean up old reports.

    Lightweight: Minimal server performance impact.

Why Choose StaffHelp?
Streamlined Moderation

StaffHelp focuses on effective report and suggestion management without unnecessary complexity, ensuring staff can act quickly and efficiently.
Community Trust

By handling reports and suggestions transparently, you show your players that their input matters and that moderation is fair and consistent.
Scalable & Easy to Use

From small community servers to large networks, StaffHelp adapts to your needs with an intuitive setup and interface.
Installation Instructions

    Download the plugin JAR file.

    Place it in your server’s plugins folder.

    Restart your server.

    Configure config.yml to your preferences.

    Assign permissions to your staff.

Permissions

    staffhelp.report – Allows players to report others (default: true)

    staffhelp.notify – Receive report notifications (default: op)

    staffhelp.readreports – View reports (default: op)

Transform your server’s moderation workflow with StaffHelp — combining in-game commands and a modern web dashboard for a complete, transparent, and efficient reporting system.

Find images in gallery section!
